description_long: This house is a two-story residential building with a flat roof and a modern Mediterranean architectural influence. The exterior features large arched windows on both floors, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with steps, a small porch, and decorative columns, surrounded by lush landscaping and several mature trees. The property is bordered by paved roads and sidewalks, with a driveway leading to a garage on the side. The house is finished in light, neutral tones, with accents of darker trim and a mix of stucco and masonry textures. Outdoor spaces include a small patio area and well-maintained greenery, enhancing the curb appeal and livability of the home.
description: A two-story Mediterranean-style house with arched windows, a flat roof, and a landscaped yard, featuring a prominent entryway and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, arched windows, and landscaped yard with trees and street elements.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the flat roof, side garage, and extensive greenery along the left side.
description_view_2: Rear-side view displaying the back and side windows, garage entrance, and additional trees.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the patio area, dense tree coverage, and the house's flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, small porch, decorative columns, and an arched doorway
